prompt: Create an ultra-realistic outdoor portrait photo of a young woman sitting sideways on a sunlit gray mountain rock, holding one lush bouquet of red roses with green leaves and visible stems clasped in both hands. She has dark hair pulled into a half-up ponytail, a calm soft smile, and her face is covered by a plain rectangular skin-tone privacy blur centered over the facial features. Outfit: pale pink chunky knit sweater, gray tailored pants, simple delicate necklace. Composition is a square 1:1 image, medium full-body seated pose from the side, knees bent, bouquet held at chest level. Background shows a dramatic alpine valley with dense evergreen forest, rolling green meadows, scattered small village houses, layered blue mountains, and warm late-afternoon sunlight. Use shallow depth of field with the background softly blurred, natural golden-hour lighting, realistic skin and fabric texture, crisp roses, cinematic travel portrait look, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
